PROMPT: You are a DeFi portfolio analyst. Your client needs a Q1 2024 realized profit and loss (P&L) report for the Ethereum wallet address 0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045. The report must cover only transactions that occurred between 2024-01-01 and 2024-03-31, across both eth-mainnet and base-mainnet networks. For each transaction in that date range: (1) retrieve the full transaction details; (2) look up the historical ETH/USD price (using symbol 'ETH/USD' via exchange rate tools) and USDC price at the date of each transaction using the available price history tools; (3) compute the USD value of each inflow and outflow at the time of the transaction; (4) produce a summary showing total inflows (USD), total outflows (USD), and net realized P&L (USD) for Q1 2024. The final report should be broken down by month (January, February, March 2024).
